ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial transaction */,
  "golfer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golfer */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather condition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather condition */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Temperature */,
  "wind_speed" TEXT /* Wind speed */,
  "humidity" TEXT /* Humidity */,
  "precipitation" TEXT /* Precipitation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_layouts" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course layout */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "total_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards of the course */,
  "par" INTEGER /* Par of the course */,
  "holes" TEXT /* JSON format for hole details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical performance */,
  "golfer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golfer */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the performance */,
  "finish" TEXT /* Final position in the tournament */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score relative to par */,
  "earnings" REAL /* Earnings from the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date(s) of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golf course */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "total_prize_money" REAL /* Total prize money of the tournament */,
  "number_of_rounds" INTEGER /* Number of rounds in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "golfers" (
  "golfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each golfer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the golfer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the golfer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the golfer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the golfer */,
  "handicap" TEXT /* Handicap of the golfer */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("golfer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the sponsor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the sponsor */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the sponsor's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "golfer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golfer */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "rounds_played" INTEGER /* Number of rounds played */,
  "fairways_hit" INTEGER /* Number of fairways hit */,
  "greens_in_regulation" INTEGER /* Number of greens hit in regulation */,
  "putts_per_round" REAL /* Average number of putts per round */,
  "driving_distance" REAL /* Average driving distance */,
  "driving_accuracy" REAL /* Percentage of drives that land in the fairway */,
  "sand_save_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of sand saves */,
  "scrambling_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of successful scrambles */,
  "penalties_incurred" INTEGER /* Number of penalties incurred */,
  "total_yards_played" INTEGER /* Total yards played during the tournament */,
  "best_hole_score" INTEGER /* Best hole score during the tournament */,
  "worst_hole_score" INTEGER /* Worst hole score during the tournament */,
  "par_3_performance" TEXT /* Performance on par 3 holes */,
  "par_4_performance" TEXT /* Performance on par 4 holes */,
  "par_5_performance" TEXT /* Performance on par 5 holes */,
  "bogey_free_rounds" INTEGER /* Number of bogey-free rounds */,
  "eagle_count" INTEGER /* Number of eagles made */,
  "birdie_count" INTEGER /* Number of birdies made */,
  "par_count" INTEGER /* Number of pars made */,
  "bogey_count" INTEGER /* Number of bogeys made */,
  "double_bogey_count" INTEGER /* Number of double bogeys made */,
  "triple_bogey_count" INTEGER /* Number of triple bogeys made */,
  "strokes_gained_total" REAL /* Total strokes gained during the tournament */,
  "strokes_gained_off_the_tee" REAL /* Strokes gained off the tee */,
  "strokes_gained_approach" REAL /* Strokes gained on approach shots */,
  "strokes_gained_around_the_green" REAL /* Strokes gained around the green */,
  "strokes_gained_putting" REAL /* Strokes gained putting */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each financial transaction
Unique identifier for each weather condition
Unique identifier for each course layout
Unique identifier for each historical performance
Total prize money of the tournament
Number of rounds in the tournament
Date of birth of the golfer
Unique identifier for each performance metric
Number of greens hit in regulation
Average number of putts per round
Percentage of drives that land in the fairway
Total yards played during the tournament
Best hole score during the tournament
Worst hole score during the tournament
Total strokes gained during the tournament
